71:
But <Emphasis>no</Emphasis>, the moon had to go and drop from the sky, causing all of that terrible commotion! Aetherytes were shattered and linkpearls rendered useless. For moons, the poor, wingless people of Eorzea had no way of communicating with each other.
...Beyond screaming at the top of their lungs, that is─which no one really approved of, kupo.
